name: Chili a La Becker
recipeInstructions:
1. Rub heavy skillet with crushed garlic clove.
2. Melt butter in the skillet. Add onion and green pepper and cook for a few minutes but do not brown.
3. Add mushrooms and celery and cook without browning.
4. Add pork and cook until lightly browned.
5. Add chili powder and mix well.
6. Add tomatoes, beans, water and season to taste with salt. Cover and cook gently for 30 to 45 minutes.
7. Makes 4 to 6 servings.
